alkylation reagent: incubated with 10 mM DTT and 50 mM iodacetamide before incubating them...
alkylation concentration: incubated with 10 mM DTT and 50 mM iodacetamide before incubating them...
cleavage agent: incubated them with 60 ng of trypsin or elastase overnight at 37 °C.
collision energy: with HCD activation and 28% collision energy.
fractionation method: 30 µg of protein was resolved on 4–20% polyacrylamide gels...
fragmentation method: with HCD activation and 28% collision energy.
instrument: using a Dionex Ultimate 3000 UPLC connected to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos...
reduction reagent: incubated with 10 mM DTT and 50 mM iodacetamide...
reduction concentration: incubated with 10 mM DTT and 50 mM iodacetamide...
